query_normalized: the impact of social comparison on self-perception in ai-generated image platforms psychology
rationale: The paper focuses on "politicization" and "topic shifts" in political science and computational social science, which is a distinct construct from the psychological mechanism of "social comparison" affecting "self-perception." While both involve social media, the paper does not measure the specific psychological variables (self-perception, social comparison) or the specific domain (AI-generated image platforms) required by the user's question, failing to meet any of the inclusion criteria (a-f)
